name: foundryvtt-fitd-tattered-king
description: Custom FitD modules for Tattered King campaign

scripts.pack:investigators: XDG_DATA_HOME=${XDG_DATA_HOME:-/tmp/fitd-ttk-fvtt-data} pnpm exec fvtt package pack --compendiumName classes --compendiumType Item --inputDirectory modules/fitd-ttk-investigators/build/packs/classes --outputDirectory modules/fitd-ttk-investigators/packs && XDG_DATA_HOME=${XDG_DATA_HOME:-/tmp/fitd-ttk-fvtt-data} pnpm exec fvtt package pack --compendiumName abilities --compendiumType Item --inputDirectory modules/fitd-ttk-investigators/build/packs/abilities --outputDirectory modules/fitd-ttk-investigators/packs && XDG_DATA_HOME=${XDG_DATA_HOME:-/tmp/fitd-ttk-fvtt-data} pnpm exec fvtt package pack --compendiumName items --compendiumType Item --inputDirectory modules/fitd-ttk-investigators/build/packs/items --outputDirectory modules/fitd-ttk-investigators/packs
scripts.build:investigators: pnpm run generate:investigators && pnpm run pack:investigators
